summary: Comprehensive testing of Onboarding Settings (Phase 1) and Team Invite (Phase 3) features. All backend endpoints pass and frontend pages render correctly.

minor.issue: When updating global settings with partial branding data, the response only includes the updated fields (company_name) not merged with defaults (missing primary_color, secondary_color, etc). This is a design choice but may cause issues if frontend expects all branding fields.

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'No route named onboarding exists' - this is a minor routing warning that doesn't affect functionality
Minor: PUT global settings merges only updated nested fields, not with defaults. Consider merging with DEFAULT_SETTINGS for complete branding object.
seed_data_creation: Created test invite codes during testing (will be auto-cleaned by expiration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding Settings and Team Invite features fully tested. All APIs working. Join page at /join/{code} shows store info and signup form. Admin onboarding-settings page shows SMS Messages, App Links, Branding, and Automation sections with placeholder reference.
mocked_api_note: SMS queuing for team welcome is implemented but Twilio integration may be mocked. Real SMS delivery not verified.
